title: Jendorn

{{Quote|Take that time me and Idow were dropped into Bruzion, a city on the planet Jendorn.|Gottu|<ref name="GaHV2" />}}
'''Jendorn''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Farstey sector/Legends|Farstey sector]]. It was situated in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]], an area over which the [[Thrawn's confederation|confederation]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|led by]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] had control. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], a fierce [[Battle of Jendorn|battle]] was fought at Jendorn between the Imperial and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces, in which the Empire was victorious.

After the battle, the Empire occupied the Jendorn [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Bruzion]], where captured [[New Republic pilot/Legends|pilots]] that had been downed in the confrontation were held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] in an [[Imperial prison compound|Imperial compound]]. Two members of the New Republic [[Katarn Commandos]] unit, [[Gottu]] and [[Idow]], were subsequently dispatched on a [[Mission to Jendorn|mission]] to rescue the [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. The lightly-armed pair of [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] were successful in their mission, during which Gottu used a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]] to cause the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] compound's [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] tower to explode.

==Description==
Jendorn was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GaHV2" /> located in the [[Jendorn system/Legends|Jendorn system]], a part of the [[Farstey sector/Legends|Farstey sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA Jendorn" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
===Battle of Jendorn===
{{Quote|The planet sits in the Borderland Regions, and it was the scene of some fierce fighting between New Republic and Imperial forces.|Gottu|<ref name="GaHV2" />}}
By [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],<ref name="TEA Jendorn" /> Jendorn was a part of the Borderland Regions,<ref name="GaHV2" /> which consisted of territories and worlds either conquered by or allied with the [[Thrawn's confederation|confederation]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], between the [[Great ReSynchronization|dates]] 44:4:15 and 44:6:29, Thrawn's forces [[Battle of Jendorn|attacked]] Jendorn as part of the early raids of the Grand Admiral's [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="TEA Jendorn" />

[[File:JendornThrawn-TEA.png|thumb|right|300px|In 9 ABY, Jendorn was the site of a battle between the New Republic and the Galactic Empire.]]
The ensuing battle saw fierce fighting between the Empire and the New Republic, and six downed [[New Republic pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the latter faction became [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] of the Empire when it ultimately prevailed in the confrontation. Following the battle, only a few Imperial [[Starship/Legends|starships]] remained in Jendorn's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] in order to monitor any ships of the New Republic. In addition, the Empire occupied the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Bruzion]], while on the opposite side of the planet the [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] inhabitants of Jendorn continued to struggle against the Imperial presence.<ref name="GaHV2" />

Eventually, [[Gottu]] and [[Idow]],<ref name="GaHV2" /> two [[Urban Guerrillas/Legends|urban combat specialists]] with the [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]] unit [[Katarn Commandos]],<ref name="TTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref> were dispatched on a [[Mission to Jendorn|mission]] to rescue the captured [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. Gottu and Idow were inconspicuously dropped off by a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] starship near Bruzion, where the pilots were being [[Prison/Legends|held]] in an [[Imperial prison compound]], and,<ref name="GaHV2" /> armed only with a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]] and two [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]],<ref name="CSWE Idow">{{CSWECite|II|77|Idow}}</ref> approached the installation on [[Limb/Legends|foot]].<ref name="GaHV2" />

===Gottu's diversion===
{{Quote|Now, you're probably thinking that we barged into that compound and simply fought our way through the platoon of troopers stationed there. Well, we did do a good bit of fighting, but first I set up a little diversion to cover our arrival.|Gottu|<ref name="GaHV2" />}}
Gottu then decided to create a diversion for the pair's mission and at the same [[Time/Legends|time]] neutralize the [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] tower protecting the prison compound. To that end, Gottu scaled the side of the tower until the [[Commando/Legends|commando]] reached the estimated height at which the structure's [[Power core/Legends|power core]] and [[Capacitor/Legends|capacitor]] rows were located. Gottu then buried the activated blade of the [[Axe/Legends|vibro-ax]] into the tower's [[Armor/Legends|armored]] wall and leaped down to the ground.<ref name="GaHV2" />

Twenty [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] later, as the two commandos were beginning to skirmish with the prison compound's [[Security guard/Legends|guards]], Gottu's vibro-ax finally cut through to the tower's power core. The resultant massive explosion distracted the guards and alerted the prisoners of their impending rescue. It also signaled to the [[Assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttle]] designated as the New Republic mission's pick-up transport that the commandos and the captured pilots were ready for extraction.<ref name="GaHV2" />

The [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], piloted by [[Syla Tors]] and with Katarn Commandos' commanding [[Officer/Legends|officer]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]], aboard, eventually arrived at the compound,<ref name="GaHV2" /> which had in the meantime been captured by Gottu and Idow,<ref name="CSWE Idow" /> and extracted the two commandos and the pilots.<ref name="GaHV2" /> Gottu and Idow subsequently became famous for the light armament with which they had accomplished the attack on the Imperial compound,<ref name="CSWE Idow" /> and at some point, Gottu recounted the mission to Jendorn to illustrate why the commando preferred [[Vibro-weapon/Legends|vibroweapons]] to other types of weaponry.<ref name="GaHV2" />

==Locations==
{{Quote|The Empire won the battle and was occupying the city. They had also set up a prison compound, and they were holding six downed Republic pilots.|Gottu|<ref name="GaHV2" />}}
The city of Bruzion was located on Jendorn. During the Galactic Empire's occupation of the city, an Imperial prison compound was established a few [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] outside of the settlement. A single turbolaser tower protected the facility, which was guarded by a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of Imperial [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]].<ref name="GaHV2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jendorn was first mentioned in "[[Gottu and His Vibro-ax|Gottu and His Vibroaxe]]," a short companion narrative included in the ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', which was authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] and published in [[1992]] for use with [[West End Games]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GaHV1">{{WEGCite|story=Gottu and His Vibro-ax|book=Dark Force Rising Sourcebook|stext=Gottu and His Vibroaxe|reprint=1}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Jendorn [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Jendorn itself, in grid square O-8.<ref name="TEA Jendorn" />
